headline: 2 Profitable Stocks Worth Investigating and 1 That Underwhelm
summary: Even if a company is profitable, it doesn’t always mean it’s a great investment. Some struggle to maintain growth, face looming threats, or fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their future potential.

headline: Labcorp closes purchase of New York pathology reference lab assets
summary: The deal, which will see Labcorp run 12 patient service centers, is part of the company’s ongoing efforts to expand through acquisitions.
